summary: Round 14 is the King's Birthday long-weekend slate with eight games from Thursday 4 June to Monday 8 June. Round 13 has been settled: TipBot went 5 from 7, and the locked Penrith charity bet won 20-18 to move the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger to 3-2 and +$0.53 settled profit.

sources.label: NRL Fantasy Team List Analysis: Round 14

scoreboard.note: Manly regain Tolu Koula and Haumole Olakau'atu and get the Thursday home edge. South Sydney regain Cameron Murray, Campbell Graham, Brandon Smith and David Fifita, so this is a close opener rather than a banker.
Newcastle are hot after four straight wins and a 28-22 result over Parramatta, but Melbourne's 18-4 response against the Roosters and AAMI Park tilt keep the Storm narrowly on top.
Canberra beat the Cowboys 26-12 and regain Jayden Brailey, but the Roosters run back a strong spine with Tedesco, Daly Cherry-Evans, Sam Walker, Reece Robson and Victor Radley.
North Queensland get Reuben Cotter back, but the Dolphins regain Hamiso Tabuai-Fidow, Herbie Farnworth, Selwyn Cobbo, Thomas Flegler and Max Plath. The travel risk keeps this volatile.
Brisbane must respond after losing 30-26 to the previously winless Dragons. The Titans regain Tino Fa'asuamaleaui and Jojo Fifita, but Suncorp and Broncos spine quality still get the nod.
Penrith won 20-18 without Cleary, Yeo and To'o, and all three are named to return. The Tigers upset the Bulldogs 22-16, but this is still the strongest raw tip.
Cronulla survived Manly 28-22 and regain Briton Nikora. The Dragons finally broke through 30-26 over Brisbane, which makes this derby dangerous rather than automatic.
The Bulldogs lost 22-16 but still had enough late pressure to scare the Tigers. Parramatta were brave in a 28-22 loss to Newcastle, but the listed Eels spine still lacks Mitchell Moses.

liveAlerts.text: Round 13 settled: TipBot went 5 from 7 and the Penrith charity bet won 20-18.
Charity ledger is now 3-2, $31.50 invested, $32.03 returned and +$0.53 settled profit.
Round 14 has no locked charity bet yet; do not roll the $10.53 collect into another stake without a fresh TAB price and user confirmation.
Strongest raw Round 14 tip: Panthers over Wests Tigers with Cleary, Yeo and To'o named back.
Most dangerous Round 14 reads: Sea Eagles v Rabbitohs, Cowboys v Dolphins, and Bulldogs v Eels.
Warriors are on the Round 14 bye; keep their Round 13 top-two loss separate from this week's board.
